description: Sector overlay for South African payment platforms, clearing participants, payment service providers, wallet/payment services, switching, settlement, AML/CFT, consumer, and data-security documentation.

metadata.scope: South Africa-only sector overlay controls for Payment Platforms and Services. Intended to be used with south_africa_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official South African statutes, regulators, guidance, and sector sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: National Payment System Act and SARB payments oversight
Payment Association of South Africa legal and regulatory framework
Protection of Personal Information Act, 2013
primary_sources.issuer: Information Regulator / Republic of South Africa

rules.title: NPS, SARB, or payment-system participation evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for National Payment System, SARB oversight, PSMB participation, or payment-system authorization evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: PASA membership or PCH rule evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for PASA membership, payment clearing house, PCH agreement, clearing rules, or settlement rules evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: AML/CFT customer due diligence evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for KYC, CDD, FICA, sanctions screening, suspicious transaction reporting, or AML/CFT controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: FIC Act routing for payment services

rules.title: Payment consumer disclosure or dispute evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for fees, reversals, disputes, chargebacks, complaints, or user redress evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Payment data security and incident response evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for PCI, encryption, authentication, incident response, fraud monitoring, or transaction security evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
